query: ok i just finished adding the rate limiter middleware to src/middleware/rateLimiter.ts. everything looks right to me but can you run the checks before we commit?
alright the payment service refactor is done — updated PaymentService.java and PaymentServiceTest.java. make sure it's all good before i push
i fixed the null check bug in user_profile.py (line 247 in services/user_profile.py). can you make sure nothing is broken?
just implemented the export-to-csv feature in the frontend. changed 3 files in src/components/DataTable/. please verify before wrapping up
subtask 2 is done — added the /api/v2/registrations endpoint to routes/registrations.js and wrote the test for it. verify it's clean?
finished the mypy migration for utils/date_helpers.py and utils/validators.py. can you check everything passes before we move on?
done with the gradle upgrade to 8.5, updated build.gradle.kts and settings.gradle. make sure the build still works
i think i got the auth bug fixed (src/auth/tokenValidator.ts) — please run the quality checks before we call it done
wrapped up the user permissions refactor, about 5 files changed across src/models/ and src/services/. is it ready to go?
all the subtasks from the spec are complete. do a final check before we create the PR

our jest test suite has been failing on CI for the past week — tests hang at 'Determining test suites to run'. nothing changed in the code, think it might be a jest config issue. can you help me figure out what's wrong?
can you explain how the detect-stack.sh script decides which verifier to run? i want to understand if it'll pick up our monorepo structure correctly
please run `npx jest --coverage` and show me the full coverage report for src/services/
i want to set up eslint with the airbnb config for this react project. can you help me install and configure it?
can you review this PR diff and tell me if the logic looks correct? paying particular attention to the edge cases in the discount calculation
before we start writing the checkout feature, let's figure out which files we'll need to touch and what the API contract should look like
the github actions pipeline is red on main branch — looks like it's failing on the integration tests step. can you look at the workflow yaml and tell me what might be wrong?
run `npx tsc --noEmit` across the whole project and list every type error you find. i want a full audit before the big refactor
our pytest is not discovering tests in tests/integration/ subdirectory — been broken since we restructured the folder layout. can you fix the pytest.ini config?
can you help me write unit tests for the OrderService class? i want at least 80% coverage on the calculateDiscount and applyPromoCode methods
